name: awesome-embodied-vla-va-vln
description: A curated list of state-of-the-art research in embodied AI, focusing on vision-language-action (VLA) models, vision-language navigation (VLN), and related multimodal learning approaches.
summaryZh: A curated list of state-of-the-art research in embodied AI, focusing on vision-language-action (VLA) models, vision-language navigation (VLN), and related multimodal learning approaches.  这是偏视觉和多模态方向的项目，适合关注图像理解与感知交互。
whyItMatters: 最近活跃度很高，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做多模态体验、视觉应用和创作工具的团队。
